rationale: Entire career is at IT-services firms (TCS, Wipro) and a fictional company (Initech) in non-technical roles (civil engineer, content writer, customer support) with zero ML, IR, or engineering production work relevant to the JD.

Only 3.8 years of experience as an analytics/data engineer at a manufacturing company (Acme Corp) with no production IR or ranking work; skills list claims advanced Qdrant and Hugging Face Transformers but career history shows data pipelines and batch ETL only, with no evidence of deployed retrieval systems.

Career spans operations management, mechanical engineering, and content writing at fictional companies (Stark Industries, Wayne Enterprises) with zero ML or software engineering work, and skills are entirely non-technical (ETL, Webpack, Redux, Marketing).

Non-technical career in sales and HR at Acme Corp and Initech (fictional) with no ML, IR, or engineering experience; skills include Airflow and Terraform at beginner level but career history shows no engineering roles whatsoever.

Only 1.3 years of experience as a graphic designer at TCS (IT services) with no ML or engineering work; the PhD in Computer Engineering from a tier_4 college is inconsistent with the graphic designer role and the profile shows no AI/IR production work.

Career is entirely project management and operations at Wayne Enterprises (fictional) and Wipro (IT services) with no technical or ML work; skills (gRPC, Kafka, Kubernetes) at beginner level do not compensate for the complete absence of AI/IR engineering experience.

Career is business analyst at Dunder Mifflin (fictional/honeypot company) and a civil engineer role at TCS, with no ML or IR engineering production work; skills listed (Go, Terraform, Next.js) are unrelated to ranking or retrieval systems.

6.1 years as a mobile/Java developer with solid backend engineering (CRED fintech) and a self-directed RAG side project, but no production ML/IR systems, no embedding or vector-search deployment experience, and primary ML exposure is limited to API calls and online courses.

6.2 years with genuine NLP pipeline work (transformers-based classification at CRED) and lightweight recommendation systems at PhonePe in production, but the current title is Computer Vision Engineer and skills skew toward diffusion models/GANs rather than IR/ranking; no evidence of hybrid retrieval, NDCG-based evaluation, or vector database deployment.

8 years of experience including ranking system ownership at LinkedIn (flagship product, millions of users) and end-to-end search/discovery at Yellow.ai, with expert-level skills in indexing algorithms, vector representations, and Python, plus an M.E. in Artificial Intelligence from IIT Roorkee — directly matches every hard requirement in the JD.
